title: PocHIS PCR Protocol
author: Jordan Sims
materials: Gently vortex all PCR reagents. Spin down in mini spinner, if necessary

Add PCR reagents to a 5mL microcentrifuge tube in the following volumes to prepare master mix: 2050µL Taq PCR Master Mix (1025µL x 2) 1722µL molecular grade water (861µL x 2) 82µL 0.1% BSA 82µL 10µM PocHIS forward primer 82µL 10µM PocHIS reverse primer
Plug in and power on thermal cyclers

steps.title: Remove 79 samples from the freezer...
steps.instruction: Remove 79 samples from the freezer to thaw on the bench

steps.title: Remove one aliquot each of Taq...
steps.instruction: Remove one aliquot each of Taq PCR Master Mix, molecular grade water, 0.1% BSA, 10µM PocHIS forward primer, and 10µM PocHIS reverse primer from the freezer to thaw on the bench

steps.title: Remove an insulated aluminum tube rack...
steps.instruction: Remove an insulated aluminum tube rack from the freezer and place PCR reagents into the rack once they are fully thawed

steps.title: Prepare 10 sets of PCR strip tubes
steps.instruction: Prepare 10 sets of PCR strip tubes. Label strips with unique ID and mark which tube is first and which is last

steps.title: Aliquot 49µL master mix into all strip tubes
steps.instruction: Aliquot 49µL master mix into all strip tubes. There should be some leftover at the end

steps.title: Add 1µL extracted DNA to each...
steps.instruction: Add 1µL extracted DNA to each PCR strip tube (or 1µL molecular grade water to negative control). Pipette onto the side of the strip tube to avoid introducing a bubble. Always double check that you are adding the correct sample to the correct strip tube

steps.title: Spin the strip tubes down in mini spinner
steps.instruction: Spin the strip tubes down in mini spinner

steps.title: Place strip tubes into miniPCR thermal cyclers
steps.instruction: Place strip tubes into miniPCR thermal cyclers. Record in the lab notebook which strips go into which thermal cycler

steps.title: Open the miniPCR software
steps.instruction: Open the miniPCR software. Click the “Devices” tab, highlight the desired thermal cycler, and click “Connect” to connect to the thermal cycler

steps.title: Click the “Library” tab, highlight the...
steps.instruction: Click the “Library” tab, highlight the PocHIS protocol, and select “Run”. Choose the appropriate thermal cycler, then select “Upload”.

steps.title: Note
steps.instruction: Note: PocHIS protocol is 94ºC for 60s; 40X 94ºC for 30s, 53ºC for 30s, and 72ºC for 60s; and 72ºC for 300s

steps.title: Double check that the PCR protocol has started running
steps.instruction: Double check that the PCR protocol has started running

steps.title: Repeat Steps 13–15 four more times...
steps.instruction: Repeat Steps 13–15 four more times to start the remaining PCR reactions

steps.title: Store PCR amplicons in the fridge
steps.instruction: Store PCR amplicons in the fridge
